General.Name: Ebusco Holding BV
General.Description: Ebusco Holding N.V., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the development, manufacture, and distribution of zero emission buses and charging systems. It also provides ancillary services to electric vehicle ecosystem; and manufactures and supplies energy storage systems and mobile energy containers, as well as change of batteries, repair, and maintenance services. The company operates in the Germany, Austria, Switzerland, Denmark, Sweden, Norway, Finland, Benelux, Spain, France, and internationally. Ebusco Holding N.V. was founded in 2010 and is headquartered in Deurne, the Netherlands.
